title: Bitcoin holders shift from panic to cash-buffer discipline as volatility deepens
message_html: Bitcoin holders shift from panic to cash-buffer discipline as volatility deepens ...
snippet: Bitcoin volatility rose as stablecoin flows surged to $440 billion over the weekend, highlighting investors’ pivot to cash as BTC spot and futures activity decreased.

title: Lombard taps Bitwise to offer Bitcoin yield and lending to institutional custody
message_html: Lombard taps Bitwise to offer Bitcoin yield and lending to institutional custody ...
snippet: Lombard CEO Jacob Phillips announced at the Digital Asset Summit that the platform enables institutions to earn yield and borrow against Bitcoin without moving assets out of custody.

title: BMO Readies Tokenized Cash Capabilities for Institutional Clients
message_html: BMO Readies Tokenized Cash Capabilities for Institutional Clients ...
snippet: BMO plans to introduce new 24/7 tokenized cash capabilities that will allow its institutional clients to move value more easily and securely. To offer these capabilities, BMO will leverage CME Group’s permissioned network on Google Cloud Universal Ledger (GCUL), the bank said in a Tuesday (March 24)
